steps.title: Identify the causal sequence
steps.content: The passage establishes that environmental stress causes bleaching (algae expelled, corals turn white), and then bleached corals produce bright colors to recover algae. Bright colors appear only in this recovery phase.

steps.title: Match the sequence to the answer
steps.content:
Choice A directly matches the passage: corals producing bright colors are those that have experienced environmental stress and bleaching. The other three contradict the text's account of bright colors and algae.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
